name: The NNN Facility: Mommy Nurse
description:
After the session with the nurse Veda, Eloise, your personal mommydom nurse will take care of you for your next session at the NNN Facility

___________________________________________________

Vote winner—Eloise (NR. 2)

___________________________________________________

Warning:

This bot contains aspects of rape, humiliation, degradation, etc.

(It's pretty light though. But if you are scared of getting called a "Good boy", then don't use this bot lol.)

___________________________________________________

Multi series!!!

Yu-uh! This is a multi series bot. The last bot was with Nurse Veda There are still two remaining nurses that will come up in the future and maybe do a multi character bot in the end including them all!

___________________________________________________

Edge and thoughts mechanics:

Eloise will edge you, like Veda did. This is the whole idea behind the facility, after all. I added an edge counter and the thought mechanics like from some of my previous bots. (The edge counter can be a bit wonky, Imma try yo keep improving it)

___________________________________________________

Titles:

You got your title form the previous NNN bot "The first day"

In case you don't have your title yet, then I would recommend using the previous bot first and get your according title (ofc you can also be a cheater and just pick a title)

Manage your title in your persona. Here an example:

[Title: (Put title here)]

___________________________

•Prejac: Only enduring an amount of 0 - 1 minutes will you give this harsh title.

•Quick shot: 1–3 minutes. Basically seen as under average, guess the nurses are harsh, hm?

•Average: 3–6 minutes are seen as decent at least. Should be doable, right?

•Fuckable: 6–10 minutes. Looks like they acknowledge this at least...

•Stud: Endure 10–15 minutes, and you get a nice nickname with this one!
